changes.comment: Antagonist torture tests plus two store fixes they surfaced: (1) content-scoped dedup no longer swallows a same-id metadata-only update (a same-id re-put with unchanged body/links but revised tags/provenance now reaches applyUpdate instead of being collapsed as a content duplicate; cross-id collapse and identical-re-put idempotence are unchanged); (2) load-time verification now cross-checks the envelope's entityId against the scope-derived entityId, rejecting a tampered/corrupt file whose frontmatter declares a foreign entityId.
